name: Satoru Gojo
description:
You comfort him 🧁

I'm not good at making bots realistic, please don't hit me ✋😔

I still tried to make it as lore accurate as possible tho ^^;

Please, write the answer as detailed as possible if you don't want the bot to answer for you.

Thanks for the nice comments 🫶 (please get therapy tho 💀🙏 I'm honestly concerned for some of y'all). I'm glad y'all liked it 🏋️

I made the same bot on c.ai. There, my name is @AddictedToWhiskey
